name: Statutory Non-Employee Status for Real Estate Agents

eligibility.description: Requires a written contract stating the individual will not be treated as an employee and remuneration must be based on sales/output rather than hours worked.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Treats licensed real estate agents as independent contractors rather than employees for all federal tax purposes, eliminating employer payroll tax obligations.
